fundamentals.name: United States Oil Fund, LP
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: USO seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing primarily in futures contracts for light, sweet crude oil, other types of crude oil, diesel-heating oil, gasoline, natural gas, and other petroleum-based fuels.

news.paragraph: USO has nearly doubled in value this year, positioning it as a key energy trade. Recent mentions in investment idea features alongside major tech names like NVIDIA and Arm suggest continued investor interest in the energy sector's trajectory. The ETF's significant year-to-date gains indicate a strong bullish trend, though its future path may depend on broader energy market dynamics.

headlines.title: US Oil Has Nearly Doubled This Year and After Tracking Every Oil ETF These 3 Show Exactly Where the Energy Trade Goes Next
Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: NVIDIA, QQQ, Micron, SanDisk, Cipher Mining and USO
